Uses of Class
tif.TagHint

  • Packages that use TagHint 
    Package Description
    png
    Functionality for parsing and processing PNG image files is provided here.
    tif
    Classes for parsing and manipulating TIFF-based files.
    tif.tagspecs  

    • Uses of TagHint in png

      Fields in png declared as TagHint 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private TagHint TextKeyword.hint 
      Methods in png that return TagHint 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      TagHint TextKeyword.getHint()
      Returns the metadata interpretation hint associated with this keyword.

      Constructor Description

      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static TagHint TagHint.valueOf(java.lang.String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static TagHint[] TagHint.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
